seoTitle: How to Rotate a Page in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to rotate a page in Canva in a few clicks to switch between portrait and landscape layouts for flyers, banners, and social posts.
intro: Sometimes a design just works better in a different orientation, and Canva lets you rotate a page without starting over. This guide covers the basic steps for adjusting page orientation, plus a few reasons why it matters for things like flyers, banners, and web graphics. It's written for beginners and professionals who need flexible layouts across projects.

steps.heading: Open page settings
steps.body: Access the page or design settings menu where orientation options live.

steps.heading: Rotate the page
steps.body: Select the rotate option to flip your page between portrait and landscape as needed.

steps.heading: Save your changes
steps.body: Confirm the new orientation and save so your layout updates across the design.

steps.heading: Review use cases
steps.body: Check how the rotated layout looks for your intended output, whether that's a flyer, banner, or social graphic.

faq.question: Will rotating a page mess up my existing elements?
faq.answer: Elements may need repositioning after rotation since the canvas dimensions change; it's worth reviewing the layout afterward.

faq.question: Can I rotate just one page in a multi-page design?
faq.answer: Yes, orientation changes are typically applied per page, so you can mix portrait and landscape pages in the same file.

faq.question: Why would a business need to rotate pages often?
faq.answer: Different platforms and print formats require different orientations — for example, vertical flyers versus horizontal web banners.
